title: Update default ESP32 IP address to 192.168.43.148

requirements.text: Change the default ESP32 polling URL from http://192.168.4.1/data to http://192.168.43.148/data in the useESP32Connection hook. This default should be used when no URL has been saved to localStorage.
acceptanceCriteria: The default ESP32 URL constant in useESP32Connection.ts is set to http://192.168.43.148/data
On first load (no localStorage entry), the app polls http://192.168.43.148/data
The Settings panel pre-fills with http://192.168.43.148/data when no custom URL has been saved
Existing localStorage-saved URLs continue to take precedence over the new default

constraints: Do not change any other polling logic, reconnect behavior, or settings panel functionality
nonGoals: Modifying the Settings panel UI or save behavior
Altering chart, dashboard, or lifetime stats features
